item.name: Acacia Necklace Coffer (IL 669)
item.description:
A polished acacia chest with delicate filigree that suggests a valuable accessory lies within.

Required level: 96. IL: 669. Necklace type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.

obj.n: It's a Terrible Ring to Lose
